titleStmt.title: SII 18.280: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 280. (B.K. No. 186 of 1932-33.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone built into the northern prākāra (outside) of the Vīranārāyaṇa temple.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-mahārāya is dated in Śaka 1442, Pramdi, Jyēs11hṭha śu. 15, lunar eclipse. In this year, there were two Jyēśhṭhas and the lunar eclipse occurred in Adhika-Jyēsṭha. The details correspond to A.D. 1519, May 14, Saturday.

It states that Nayanappa-Nāyaka, son of Bāgila-Nāgi-Nāyaka granted land at Baṭṭakeṟe in Gadugina-sīme for two charity water-sheds (aṟavaṭige) to Paruva[tto]ḍeya. The land had been granted to the donor as umbai by Timmappa-Nāyaka-Ayyanavaru. The grant was made in the presence of god Virūpāks11ha on the bank of the Tuṅgabhadrā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraśuścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracā
ravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha (.) mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayā
bhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1442 neya pramādisaṁvacharada
jēṣṭa śudhdha 15 [lu .] śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇarāyamahārāya
ru pruthvīrājyaṁgeyi[U]ttiralu śrīmattu
bāgila nāgināyakkara maga nayanappanāyakaru paruvatto
ḍeyarige koṭṭa Aṟavaṭigeya holana darmmaśāsanada kra
maveṁteṁdare namage tiṁmappanāyakaAyyanavaru Uṁ
baḷiyāgi pālisida gadugina sīmeyoḷagaṇa baṭṭakeṟe
ya grāmadalu gadugida śrītriyaṁbakadēvarigeU prītiyā
śrīvīranārayaṇadēvarigeU prītiyāgi gadagina tēra bīdiya vo
ḷagaṇa koṭeya muṁde voṁdu Āṟavaṭege baṭṭakeṟa(ṟe) benakana
koppada naḍuve Ubhayamārggada dāriyali voṁdu Āṟa
vaṭige kūḍi Eraḍu Aṟavaṭigau sarvvamānyavāgi ko
ṭṭa hatu koḷagada ha (ho)lana catussīmeya vivara baṭṭakeṟe
yiṁ mūḍalu nāgasamudrake teṁkalu lakṣmīnārāyaṇa
purakke hōha kāludāriyiṁ baḍagalu yī catussīmeya
naḍuve khaṁ . ṁ koḷagada biḷiya bhūmiyanū nāu nima
ge sōmagrāhaḷada puṁṇyakāladalu tuṁgabhadrātīrada
śrīvirūpākṣadēvara saṁnidhiyalli sarvvamāṁnya
ṭṭevāgi Ā hattukoḷagada biḷiya holanu vya
māḍikoṇḍu Ā holana catussīmeyavoḷagaṇa Aṣṭabhōgatē
jasvāmyavanu nīu sukhadalu putrapautrapāraṁpare
Ācaṁdrārkkastayigaḷāgi Anubhavisikoṁḍu yī Era[ḍu Ā]
ṟavaṭige nīrahoyadukoṁḍu sukhadalu yihadu
du koṭṭa Aṟavaṭigeya mānyada holana dharmmaśāsana
svadattādviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ parada
ttāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dānapālanayōrmma
dhyē dānātsrēyōnrupālanaṁ . dānāsvarggamavapnōti pālanāda
cyutu padaṁ . yī dharmmavanāru pālisi nu(na)ḍasidavaru Avara
pāda naṁma maṁḍeya mēle yihau . © .
Digital edition of SII 18.280 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
